Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For: 1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty 2) Compelling Redress Of Breach Of Trust 3) Removal And Appointment Of Successor Trustee 4) Suspension And Appointment Of Temporary Trustee 5) Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For: 1) Breach Of Fiduciary Duty 2) Compelling Redress Of Breach Of Trust 3) Removal And Appointment Of Successor Trustee 4) Suspension And Appointment Of Temporary Trustee 5) Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Tanya Ortega and Brian Geremia appeared via zoom for and with Larry Zellers (beneficiary).
Shiela Robello appeared via zoom for Michael Henry.

Mr. Geremia stated that the trustee resides in Texas, that the sale of the property was located in San Francisco, that all parties signed a settlement agreement to handle the matter exclusively in San Francisco, and that all parties will mediate and if resolved matter will be taken off calendar. Petition for breach of fiduciary duty etc., is continued to December 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. File status of mediation by December 06, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (814 Grove Street, San Francisco, Ca 94117)
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Dave Jones appearing via zoom for a and with (Objector) Larry Russell Zellers appearing via zoom.
Benjamin C. Graves appearing in person for (trustee) Melissa Henry.

Mr. Jones clarified that his bosses name is on the substitution of attorney and that either he or one of the other associates will be appearing in this matter. Mr. Graves stated that the objectors has executed two quit claim deeds, that he removed his objections with some conditions, the sale has already occurred, and that they no longer need the Courts order. The Court notes that there are many issues with the sale. Mr. Jones stated that they will mediate on the remaining issues. The report sale and petition for order confirming sale of real property is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Martinez. Not reported.
